blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
